options.a: Unacceptable deviations from the localizer course and glide path.
options.b: They are deviations from the nominal localizer course and glide path and can be checked by flight tests.
options.c: Deviations from the mean localizer course which must be corrected when they are more than half course deflections.
options.d: Deviations from the nominal localizer course and glide path which can be corrected by the flight management computer.
